name: feed-parser-01
original_desc: Parses real-time market data feeds from Bloomberg and Reuters, normalizing equity prices and trade volumes into a standardized schema for downstream consumption.
activity_logs: Day 1-5: feed_connect x40, schema_normalize x38, data_validate x35, publish_event x35. Output: parsed 38 Bloomberg equity feeds, normalized 35 price records, validated trade volume schemas. Day 6-10: feed_connect x42, schema_normalize x40, data_validate x38, error_log x3. Output: ingested Reuters FX data, normalized currency pairs, logged 3 malformed feed errors. Day 11-15: feed_connect x39, schema_normalize x37, publish_event x37, data_validate x36. Output: processed equity price updates, published 37 normalized events to downstream consumers. Day 16-20: feed_connect x44, schema_normalize x42, data_validate x40, publish_event x40. Output: high-volume trade feed ingestion, normalized 42 Bloomberg records, validated trade volume schemas. Day 21-25: feed_connect x38, schema_normalize x36, data_validate x34, error_log x2. Output: parsed market close feed, normalized end-of-day equity prices, logged 2 schema mismatches. Day 26-30: feed_connect x41, schema_normalize x39, data_validate x37, publish_event x37. Output: ingested pre-market data feeds, normalized price ticks, published events to data lake.
evolved_desc: Primary activity involves data validate and schema normalize operations. Key functions include normalized, feed connect, and publish event processing. Regular tasks involve feed, price, equity workflows.

name: stream-loader-02
original_desc: Streams high-frequency trading data into the data warehouse using Kafka consumers, handling deduplication and late-arriving events for accurate time-series storage.
activity_logs: Day 1-5: kafka_consume x120, deduplicate x18, warehouse_insert x102, lag_monitor x10. Output: consumed 120 Kafka messages from trading topic, deduplicated 18 duplicate events, inserted 102 trade records into warehouse. Day 6-10: kafka_consume x135, deduplicate x22, warehouse_insert x113, checkpoint_write x5, lag_monitor x12. Output: streamed high-frequency order book updates, handled late-arriving events, wrote 5 Kafka checkpoints. Day 11-15: kafka_consume x118, deduplicate x15, warehouse_insert x103, lag_monitor x8. Output: processed trading stream, deduplicated late events, loaded time-series trade data into warehouse. Day 16-20: kafka_consume x142, deduplicate x25, warehouse_insert x117, checkpoint_write x7. Output: peak trading session, high-volume kafka stream consumption, dedup processing, warehouse inserts. Day 21-25: kafka_consume x110, deduplicate x14, warehouse_insert x96, lag_monitor x9. Output: off-peak trading stream, deduplication, time-series warehouse storage for analytics. Day 26-30: kafka_consume x128, deduplicate x20, warehouse_insert x108, checkpoint_write x6. Output: end-of-month trading data stream, kafka consumer lag monitored, warehouse bulk inserts completed.
evolved_desc: Primary activity involves deduplicate and kafka consume operations. Key functions include warehouse insert, trading, and lag monitor processing. Regular tasks involve stream, kafka, warehouse workflows.
